methodLine: Measured from public datasets and reporting APIs. Some values are unavailable where public sources do not provide comparable data.

sourceGroups.label: Funding data
sourceGroups.publicBasis: OCHA FTS / HPC and FTS datasets
sourceGroups.contribution: Funding requirements, received funding, coverage, gaps, and donors where public values are available.
sourceGroups.limitations: Funding data is shown only when requirement and received values can be compared without guessing.

sourceGroups.label: Media/article counts
sourceGroups.contribution: Article-count movement for the last 30 days, previous 30 days, and last 90 days.
sourceGroups.limitations: Article counts are contextual attention signals, not confirmation of humanitarian conditions.

sourceGroups.label: Humanitarian reporting
sourceGroups.contribution: Report-volume movement and public reporting concentration where the API provides comparable values.
sourceGroups.limitations: Report volume reflects publication behaviour and access to public reporting, not severity by itself.

sourceGroups.label: Food/market data
sourceGroups.contribution: Market and commodity coverage; price movement only when safely extractable.
sourceGroups.limitations: Dataset coverage is not food-price severity unless commodity-level prices are parsed.

sourceGroups.label: Structured humanitarian indicators
sourceGroups.contribution: Structured humanitarian dataset coverage for comparable public analysis.
sourceGroups.limitations: Dataset availability indicates comparability; it is not an indicator value.
